sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 296 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection Nos.24 & 30 2. For orders on CMA No.442/2019 3. For hearing of main case 22.01.2026 Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, advocate for the applicant Per learned counsel, question before the court in this reference has already been decided against the department by virtue of judgment reported as 2017 PTD 851. In view hereof learned counsel states that in mutatis mutandis application of the reasoning set out therein, this reference may be dismissed subject to right of applicant to file appeal before the honourable Supreme Court. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
